name: NACCO INDUSTRIES INC
summary: PART I General NACCO Industries, Inc. (NACCO) and its wholly owned subsidiary, NACCO Natural Resources Corporation (NACCO Natural Resources, and with NACCO collectively, the Company, we, our or us), bring natural resources to life by delivering aggregates, minerals, reliable fuels and environmental solutions through our robust portfolio of businesses. We operate under three reportable business segments: Utility Coal Mining, Contract Mining and Minerals and Royalties. The Utility Coal Mining segm...
